metadata._comment_purpose: Overrides the workspace function 'imAuthentication' (deployed by MS FullDeploymentAuthentication.json) so that the StealthTalk vim parser participates in the ASIM Authentication union. Re-deploys the function with the same FunctionAlias and uses etag='*' to overwrite the existing saved-search.
metadata._comment_signature: Public signature matches the Microsoft contract: (starttime, endtime, username_has_any, targetappname_has_any, srcipaddr_has_any_prefix, srchostname_has_any, eventtype_in, eventresultdetails_in, eventresult, pack). 'pack' (not 'disabled') is the public param; 'disabled' is computed per-source from the ASimDisabledParsers watchlist.
metadata._comment_source_list: Source list synchronized with the actual MS body deployed in stealthtalk-analytics-security workspace (May 2026). 36 built-in MS source parsers + 1 custom (vimAuthenticationStealthTalk).
metadata._comment_maintenance: When Microsoft updates FullDeploymentAuthentication.json (adds/removes source parsers), open Functions -> imAuthentication -> Edit, copy the new union list, and re-sync the body below. Keep vimAuthenticationStealthTalk(...) as the LAST entry in the union, classified under imAuthenticationCustomDisabled.
metadata._comment_override_rationale: Using etag:'*' to overwrite the MS-deployed imAuthentication function is the documented ASIM extension pattern for partner-published parsers. The alternative — exposing a separate StealthTalk-aware union function — was considered and rejected because downstream consumers (built-in MS analytic rules, hunting queries, Workbook ASIM panels, third-party content) all call imAuthentication() by name; introducing a parallel function would make StealthTalk events invisible to that ecosystem and defeat the purpose of being an ASIM-compliant source.
metadata._comment_update_process: Update procedure (run on each MS ASIM release): (1) In the workspace, run `.show function imAuthentication | project Parameters, Body` to capture the latest MS body; (2) Diff against the body in this file; (3) If MS added/removed source parsers in their union, sync the changes here, keeping vimAuthenticationStealthTalk last; (4) Bump contentVersion (line 3) by one patch digit; (5) Re-deploy via this template — etag:'*' will overwrite the workspace function safely; (6) Verify with `imAuthentication() | where EventVendor == 'StealthTalk' | take 1`. This update is required only on MS ASIM Authentication minor/major releases (~quarterly cadence per MS ASIM SIG); built-in source parser version bumps inside the same MS release do not require a re-sync.
metadata._comment_monitoring: Sentinel Health workbook (built-in) reports when ASIM parser functions are modified. The override is logged once at deploy time; subsequent MS FullDeploymentAuthentication.json re-deploys may revert this extension (last-writer-wins on etag:'*'), in which case re-run this template to restore the StealthTalk entry.

metadata.description: Name of the Log Analytics / Microsoft Sentinel workspace (e.g. stealthtalk-analytics-security).

properties.FunctionParameters: starttime:datetime=datetime(null), endtime:datetime=datetime(null), username_has_any:dynamic=dynamic([]), targetappname_has_any:dynamic=dynamic([]), srcipaddr_has_any_prefix:dynamic=dynamic([]), srchostname_has_any:dynamic=dynamic([]), eventtype_in:dynamic=dynamic([]), eventresultdetails_in:dynamic=dynamic([]), eventresult:string='*', pack:bool=False
properties.query:
let Generic=(starttime: datetime=datetime(null), endtime: datetime=datetime(null), username_has_any: dynamic = dynamic([]), targetappname_has_any: dynamic = dynamic([]), srcipaddr_has_any_prefix: dynamic = dynamic([]), srchostname_has_any: dynamic = dynamic([]), eventtype_in: dynamic = dynamic([]), eventresultdetails_in: dynamic = dynamic([]), eventresult: string = '*', pack: bool=false) {
 let DisabledParsers=materialize(_GetWatchlist('ASimDisabledParsers')
 | where SearchKey in ('Any', 'ExcludeimAuthentication')
 | extend SourceSpecificParser=column_ifexists('SourceSpecificParser', '')
 | distinct SourceSpecificParser);
 let imAuthenticationBuiltInDisabled=toscalar('ExcludeimAuthenticationBuiltIn' in (DisabledParsers) or 'Any' in (DisabledParsers));
 let imAuthenticationCustomDisabled=toscalar('ExcludeimAuthenticationCustom' in (DisabledParsers) or 'Any' in (DisabledParsers));
 union isfuzzy=true
 vimAuthenticationEmpty,
 vimAuthenticationAADManagedIdentitySignInLogs (starttime=starttime, endtime=endtime, username_has_any=username_has_any, targetappname_has_any=targetappname_has_any, srcipaddr_has_any_prefix=srcipaddr_has_any_prefix, srchostname_has_any=srchostname_has_any, eventtype_in=eventtype_in, eventresultdetails_in=eventresultdetails_in, eventresult=eventresult, disabled=(imAuthenticationBuiltInDisabled or ('ExcludevimAuthenticationAADManagedIdentitySignInLogs' in (DisabledParsers)))),
